channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham cleared to run for selection in pivotal by-election
item.description: Burnham cleared to run for selection in pivotal by-election

item.title:
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Burnham kept telling MPs to keep the faith. But the search kept having setbacks. Until Simons agreed - because Makerfield is exactly the place to prove what Burnham needs to prove.
“I think being a constituency MP ra...
item.description:
Burnham kept telling MPs to keep the faith. But the search kept having setbacks. Until Simons agreed - because Makerfield is exactly the place to prove what Burnham needs to prove.
“I think being a constituency MP ra...

item.title: BBC Politics: How Rayner, Streeting and Burnham weakened PM in 12 hours of political drama
item.description: How Rayner, Streeting and Burnham weakened PM in 12 hours of political drama

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Trump warns it will be ‘tough’ for Starmer to survive as prime minister
item.description: Trump warns it will be ‘tough’ for Starmer to survive as prime minister

item.title: BBC Politics: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues
item.description: UK borrowing costs rise and pound falls as leadership drama continues

item.title: Novara Media: How Burnham’s By-Election Will Transform UK Politics

item.title: i Politics: First Cabinet minister backs Andy Burnham's return
item.description: First Cabinet minister backs Andy Burnham's return

item.title: BBC Politics: Will Makerfield decide the next PM?

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): How team Burnham finally cleared the first of many hurdles on route to Westminster

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham approved to stand in by-election – opening path to challenge Starmer for leadership
item.description: Andy Burnham approved to stand in by-election – opening path to challenge Starmer for leadership
